creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
This is from a fresh buildup of 10.3R from scratch.  The problem was one of many that I ran into trying to build up an install of 11.1, which is why I decided to revert to 10.3.  Unfortunately it's there, too!

15:28 Tue, 22 Aug                                                               [fastcat:root]~ > samba-tool user create root

New Password: 
Retype Password: 
ERROR(<type 'exceptions.ValueError'>): Failed to add user 'root':  - unable to parse dn string
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/samba/netcmd/user.py", line 197, in run
    gecos=gecos, loginshell=login_shell)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/samba/samdb.py", line 356, in newuser
    dnsdomain = ldb.Dn(self, self.domain_dn()).canonical_str().replace("/", "")

15:29 Tue, 22 Aug                                                               [fastcat:root]~ >
